sections.label: Verse 1
lines: I was lost in the in-between
Half-asleep in a quiet dream
Looking for a feeling I could trust
Then you said my name like a secret
Every doubt faded when you meant it
Now I see what love really was

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: If it’s real, it doesn’t shout
It pulls you in, it pulls you out

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Let it be love, let it run through us
No fear now, no pressure, no rush
If it’s true, it’s always been You
Every broken part made new
Let it be love, soft but alive
From your heart to mine tonight
This is where it starts
Heart to heart

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: I used to think love was fragile
Something fading after a while
Something I’d be scared to lose
But the way you stay in the silence
Feels like truth, feels like guidance
Like the dark finally learned to move

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: If it’s love, it doesn’t hide
It meets you right where you are inside

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Let it be love, no disguise
No perfect words, just open eyes
If it’s real, I feel it move
Every time I fall to You
Let it be love, slow and deep
Every promise we can keep
This is where I start
Heart to heart

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Maybe love was never loud
Maybe it was always now
In the quiet, in the close
In the spaces I need You most

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Let it be love, let it run through us
No fear now, no pressure, no rush
If it’s true, it’s always been You
Every broken part made new
Let it be love, soft but alive
From your heart to mine tonight
This is where it starts
Heart to heart

sections.label: Outro
lines: Let it be love
Let it be love
